reason: data/wins.json on origin/main is currently unparseable as JSON. node test.js, node build.js, and any agent that JSON.parse()s the file will throw at byte 418561 (line 1411 col 2374). Root cause: the WIN-064 detail_extra string had an HTML <span class="archive-cite"> with embedded <a href="..."> attributes inserted between commits 6e68bba and d09d978, but the four nested double quotes (class="archive-cite" plus href="...") were not escaped to \". The script build-scripts/fix-json-quotes.js was authored for exactly this class of bug and resolves it cleanly (verified: 4 unescaped quotes fixed in 4 passes, file then parses, all 71 wins recovered, byte-delta = +4).
operator_action: 1) cd to your clone with direct push (e.g., the workspace-sync clone or your hand clone).
2) git pull origin main so you have d09d978.
3) node build-scripts/fix-json-quotes.js data/wins.json — should report 'fixed 4 unescaped quotes in 4 passes'.
5) node test.js — re-run the suite. wins.json schema check should turn green.
6) (Optional but recommended) node build.js html — re-render docs/index.html now that wins.json parses.
7) git add data/wins.json docs/index.html && git commit -m 'Fix unescaped quotes in WIN-064 detail_extra (archive-cite span)' && git push.

8) ALSO copy the fixed data/wins.json from clone to FUSE: cp data/wins.json /sessions/<session>/mnt/dome-model-review/data/wins.json. Without this step, FUSE retains the broken copy and the next workspace-sync run could universal-pusher-rescue the broken content back over the fix. (workspace-sync's mtime-guard normally prevents this, but only if the clone-pushed commit's mtime is newer than the FUSE file's mtime — which it should be, but explicitly resyncing FUSE removes the race.)
9) Move this stranded-patches file to monitor/decisions/applied-stranded-patches/ once landed.

exact_diff_summary.fragment_with_unescaped_quotes: [both quotes archived verbatim at raw-text/02b-wins-V51-win064.txt, captured 2026-05-08; live page MD5 16d65a42722d2d5869842d14c8f699f0 has been byte-identical across 34 consecutive poller checks (~17 days through 2026-05-07T11:05:55Z), so the citation is auditable against both our archive and the dome's currently-served page]
exact_diff_summary.fix: Escape the four bare " characters as \" (two from class="archive-cite", two from href="https://...02b-wins-V51-win064.txt"). build-scripts/fix-json-quotes.js does this automatically.
exact_diff_summary.verified_repair: Tested on a copy in /sessions/friendly-relaxed-cori/mnt/outputs/wins-test.json: fix-json-quotes.js reports '4 unescaped quotes in 4 passes'; resulting file parses; 71 wins recovered; byte-delta = +4.

preventive_proposal: PROP-024 (file: monitor/tinker/proposals/PROP-024-workspace-sync-json-validity-gate.json) proposes a pre-push JSON validity gate in workspace-sync to prevent unparseable JSON from ever landing on main again.
